title: Urgent Update: ACES-GST Application Unavailable on May 25, 2026
content:
# Urgent Update: ACES-GST Application Unavailable on May 25, 2026

Ek important update hai. CBIC ne ACES-GST application par urgent maintenance activity announce kiya hai. Taxpayers ko iski jaankari honi chahiye to avoid any last-minute hassle.

*   **What:** Urgent maintenance activity for the ACES-GST application.
*   **When:** The ACES-GST application will be unavailable on May 25, 2026, from 18:00 hrs to 22:00 hrs.
*   **Impact:** During this four-hour window, the ACES-GST application will not be accessible.
*   **Advisory:** All Central Excise / HSNS Cess / Service Tax taxpayers are kindly requested to plan their activities accordingly. The inconvenience caused is regretted.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the CBIC-GST Portal for updates](https://www.cbic-gst.gov.in)

*Published on: 26 May 2026*
